releases.author: l1xnan
releases.description:
###    🚀 Features

This update mainly upgrades the PDF preview logic.

- Version 1.0 preview is based on WebView. It works by copying the rendered DOM structure and print-related CSS into a WebView to simulate the print effect. Many exceptions may occur during this process, such as invalid custom rendering of some plugins and CSS conflicts.
- Version 2.0 renders directly on the main page and exports content to PDF, allowing direct preview of the generated PDF file. This has essentially resolved issues including rendering anomalies and style conflicts present in version 1.0.

###    🐞 Bug Fixes

- Add upscale or font size feature to zoom content  -  by @l1xnan in https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/issues/406 [<samp>(eec45)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/eec45f4)
- Add PdfPreview V2  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(8b41a)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/8b41a00)
- Update dependencies  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(a74fe)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/a74fe71)
- Svelte refactor  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(e419f)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/e419faf)
- Add progress  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(4f24b)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/4f24b23)
- Refactor webview preview  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(afb5c)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/afb5c06)
- Refactor ExportConfigModal  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(5cd2c)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/5cd2ca4)
- Refactor ExportConfigModal  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(a680f)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/a680f31)
- Refactor code  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(4d18b)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/4d18b7f)
- Build the project with Vite  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(73aaf)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/73aaf55)
- Refactor PdfPreview component  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(5797a)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/5797a08)
- Refactor ExportSettings component  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(ef071)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/ef07157)
- Refactor handlePrintToPDF method  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(ce66a)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/ce66ab5)
- Refactor makePrintOptions method  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(31428)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/31428c7)
- CanvasDocs update failed  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(b0869)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/b08690d)
- Improve the PDF export feature for Version 2.  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(5445e)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/5445e55)
- Outline anchor points are not working  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(dbbd5)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/dbbd5ad)
- Refactor style  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(f7131)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/f7131f3)
- Dynamically hide title in preview view  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(ed8da)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/ed8daf6)
- Improve the multi-file export function  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(d0fb2)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/d0fb238)
- When printing multiple files separately, content merging and duplicate printing occur.  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(0ee38)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/0ee384b)
- Avoid duplicate rendering  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(8e104)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/8e104ab)
- Optimize the PDF export function for multiple files.  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(8cbb8)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/8cbb846)
- Cache PDF preview files with the same configuration.  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(29c1a)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/29c1aff)
- Add the option to select the PDF rendering engine version.  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(a752e)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/a752e82)
- Dynamically switch between PDF and HTML preview views.  -  by @l1xnan [<samp>(71c4c)</samp>](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/commit/71c4c0c)

#####     [View changes on GitHub](https://github.com/l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf/compare/1.11.0...2.0.0.beta.1)

	```
	[[^abc]]
	```
